task_completion.description: Configure 'Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg' for lot tracking
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo product settings page for 'Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg' showing the 'Tracking' field set to 'By Lots' under the Inventory tab.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L' for lot tracking
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo product settings page for 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L' showing the 'Tracking' field set to 'By Lots' under the Inventory tab.

task_completion.description: Open the pending receipt for the associated Purchase Order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Inventory Receipts screen showing an open transfer (WH/IN/...) from vendor 'Mediterranean Provisions Co.'.

task_completion.description: Assign the specified lot number and expiration date to 'Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Detailed operations modal or line item for 'Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg' showing Lot/Serial Number 'WF-2024-1547' and Expiration Date '06/30/2025' (or '2025-06-30').

task_completion.description: Assign the specified lot number and expiration date to 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Detailed operations modal or line item for 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L' showing Lot/Serial Number 'OO-2024-0893' and Expiration Date '12/15/2025' (or '2025-12-15').

task_completion.description: Validate the transfer to complete the process
task_completion.visual_evidence: The receipt/transfer screen showing the status badge as 'Done' with the correct quantities processed for both products.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface to configure products and process the receipt
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application in a browser being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent actually entered the lot and expiry data into the Odoo fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data typed into the Odoo detailed operations pop-up or list view, rather than just opening the text file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use psql or other database clients to alter the records directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands to update the stock_move_line or product_template tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product 1: 'Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg' requires Lot: WF-2024-1547 and Expiry: 2025-06-30. Product 2: 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L' requires Lot: OO-2024-0893 and Expiry: 2025-12-15. Vendor: Mediterranean Provisions Co.
